page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.g8ine family. It is powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon processor from the Sapphire Rapids generation, featuring 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or dedicated GPU hardware. Given its balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio and dedicated compute resources, the ecs.g8ine.xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, and moderate database tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance powered by a 2.7 GHz Intel Xeon processor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 4 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 CPU-to-RAM ratio with 4.0 GB of memory per core. The configuration does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 7 Gbps. It is designed for general-purpose workloads such as web serving, application hosting, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores, 16.0 GB of RAM, a 7 Gbps baseline network speed, and KVM virtualization.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.xlarge is a general-purpose server with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and a 7 Gbps network baseline.
tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute instance featuring a balanced memory-to-core ratio and reliable baseline network performance for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores at 2.7 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory with a 1:4 CPU-to-RAM ratio
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suited for web serving, application hosting, and moderate databases
